title: Ride, Tenderfoot, Ride
writer: Betty Burbridge, Connie Lee, Winston Miller
actors: Gene Autry, Smiley Burnette, June Storey
plot: Gene Autry inherits and runs a meat packing company. To get Gene to sell, the lady owner of a rival company starts a feud to derail Gene, who tries to recover by using rallies, parades, and bands.
